explanations.13: This sets the user ID and group ID (1000:1000) that the Joomla container will run as, rather than as root for security reasons.
explanations.17: This mounts a folder from your computer (./site_joomla) into the container's web directory (/var/www/html) so changes you make locally appear in the running container.
explanations.25: Like line 13, this runs the MySQL database container as user 1000 instead of root for better security.
explanations.29: This stores the MySQL database files in ./db on your computer so the data persists even if the container is stopped or deleted.
